name: sensorQueueWriteFrame
title: sensorQueueWriteFrame
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueWriteFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte[] writeBuffer, dword writeByteCount); // from 1
SensorErrorCode sensorQueueWriteFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte[] writeBuffer, dword writeByteCount, dword startDelayNs); // from 2
description: This function is intended to be used for I2C master simulation. It queues a frame to write the given bytes to the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued in.

parameters.name: writeBuffer
parameters.description: Buffer containing the bytes to be sent to the slave.

parameters.name: writeByteCount
parameters.description: Length of the write buffer in bytes.

parameters.name: startDelayNs
parameters.description: Delay in ns before the frame is actually sent to the slave.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
